title: stevia chamaedrys var. glandulifera
intro: Stevia chamaedrys var. glandulifera, also known as Mexican sweet leaf, is a variety of the Stevia rebaudiana plant, which is a natural sweetener and medicinal herb. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to offer various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving blood sugar control, and supporting weight loss. Stevia chamaedrys var. glandulifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
